_description: Rules applied per question for Colombia vs Ghana 2026-07-04

per_question.note: Anytime scorer mid=0.3193 (liquid). Matches his solid group form (1 goal, 1 assist, avg 3.67 shots/game).

Score-or-assist offer=0.5405 (illiquid) x0.945=0.5108. Trimmed to 0.42 -- James started all 3 group games with zero goals AND zero assists, a real production signal the market may be underweighting relative to generic 'creative Colombian midfielder' pricing.
SOT OU1.5 (2+) offer=0.119 (illiquid) x0.945=0.1125. Confirmed by ESPN: 0 SOT across all 3 group games for Semenyo.
BTTS Yes mid=0.4133. Direct market use.
Anytime scorer offer=0.1316 (illiquid) x0.945=0.1244, trimmed slightly to 0.09 -- Ayew recorded ZERO shots in all 3 group games despite starting every game, an even weaker signal than Semenyo's.
Fitted lambda=5.436 from COL SOT OU5.5 Over=0.4601 -> P(>=7)=0.304.
Cards OU3.5 Over mid=0.2976, matches Poisson fit (0.297).
Fitted lambda=23.924 from Total shots OU23.5 Over=0.521 -> P(>=22)=0.681. Colombia alone averages 19.67 shots/game.
Colombia corners OU5.5 Over mid=0.5026 -- exact market match for '6 or more'.

No market. Own-team-avg combined lambda=7.0 (COL 4.33 + GHA 2.67, inflated by COL's 7-offside outlier vs CDR) -> P(>=3)=0.97. Match-environment lambda=4.5 -> P(>=3)=0.826. Even excluding the CDR outlier, COL's remaining games (3,3) still support a moderate-high rate. Shaded down from the raw readings to 0.75 for outlier caution, but this is a genuinely high-offside matchup unlike AUS-EGY.
OU2.5 Over mid=0.4631, matches Poisson fit from the goal-total lambda (0.464).
Goal_1_time_bracket sum(1-10, 11-20, 40% of 21-30)=0.4323. Cross-check via total-lambda(2.531) scaled to ~24/93 = 0.480. Blended 0.46.
